name: Oatmeal Raisin Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, salt, and oats. Mix well with wire whisk and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend sugars with an electric mixer on medium speed.
4. Add butter and mix until a grainy paste forms.
5. Scrape down the sides of the bowl, then add honey, vanilla, and eggs. Mix at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture, raisins, and walnuts to the sugar mixture, blending at low speed just until combined.
7. Do not overmix.
8. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, about 1 1/2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 22-24 minutes or until cookies are light golden brown.
10. Immediately transfer cookies with a spatula to a cool flat surface.
